Linear
and
star-branched
copolymers
of PLGA were
synthesized

by bulk melt polymerization of
the lactones
(lactide and glycolide)
in
the presence of the PEG, glucose, or b-CD using Sn-octoate as catalyst.
High yields of copolymer (Table 1) and no detectable homopolymers of
lactide and glycolide explicitly demonstrate the versatility of polymer-
ization reaction.

methylene groups of PEG. The multiplets at 5.2 and 4.8 ppm correspond
to the lactide CH and the glycolide CH2, respectively.
